channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Egypt say Dallas police officer pushed player, team director at World Cup
item.description: A security officer pushed the fan, as well as Trezeguet and Hassan, at the team hotel in Dallas before Egypt's match.

item.title: Venezuela’s Rodriguez blames ‘propaganda’ for quake response backlash
item.description: Venezuela's acting president Delcy Rodriguez dismissed criticism of the government's response.

item.title: Venezuela’s Rodriguez blames ‘propaganda’ for quake response backlash
item.description: Venezuela's acting president Delcy Rodriguez dismissed criticism of the government's quake response.

item.title: Thousands forced to evacuate in Colorado as wildfire spreads
item.description: The Aspen Acres Fire, one of about 40 wildfires burning across western US, has destroyed homes and forced evacuations.

item.title: ‘A nightmare’: Strugging with the aftermath of Venezuela’s earthquakes
item.description: Many survivors are sheltering in tents set up in public parks, after twin earthquakes destroyed rows of buildings.

item.title: NASA launches robotic mission to save telescope falling back to Earth
item.description: A three-armed spacecraft blasts into orbit to rescue a NASA telescope in danger of crashing back to Earth.

item.title: Salah awaits Messi as Egypt beat Australia on penalties at World Cup
item.description: Egypt beat Australia 4-2 on penalties after a 1-1 draw after extra time, and could now face Argentina in the last 16.

item.title: Massive wildfire spreads in Portugal amid extreme heat and strong wind
item.description: A raging wildfire near Vouzela in central Portugal spread across several municipalities, driven by winds and heat

item.title: Dutch football association to sue over racist slurs after World Cup exit
item.description: The Netherlands' penalty loss to Morocco prompted an outpouring of social media abuse directed notably at Black players.

item.title: Is China’s new ethnic unity law a step towards forced assimilation?
item.description: The government says the law will help forge a shared national identity.

item.title: Mamdani calls for unity on America’s 250th birthday
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani marked the US's 250th birthday by reflecting on the nation's founding ideals.

item.title: US heatwave raises alarms over AI data centre energy demands
item.description: US heatwave exposes critical strain on power grids from growing energy demands of AI data centres.

item.title: Lebanon-Israel deal betrays ‘victims of war crimes’, rights groups say
item.description: Human rights and media freedom organisations warned that the agreement prevents 'recourse to international courts'.

item.title: Settlers attack activists, Palestinians trying to access their land
item.description: Israeli settlers attacked a foreign activist and another man as they blocked access to Palestinian farmland.

item.title: Saudi deputy foreign minister pays respects at Khamenei funeral
item.description: Saudi Arabia’s Vice Foreign Minister Walid al-Khuraiji unexpectedly attended the former Supreme Leader's funeral

item.title: Argentina vs Cape Verde LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as Lionel Messi's goal gives Argentina lead against Cape Verde in last-32 knockout stage.

item.title: Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies for slain Supreme Leader Khamenei
item.description: Top Iranian officials and foreign dignitaries pay respects to late leader killed in joint US-Israeli strike in February.

item.title: Israeli settlers intensify attacks in West Bank, targeting water supplies
item.description: The attacks mark a sharp spike in settler assaults on Palestinians and their homes and livelihoods in recent weeks.

item.title: Pope Leo, Mamdani send pro-immigrant message for US’s 250th anniversary
item.description: Influential figures deliver speeches evoking US ideals to counter President Trump's hardline immigration policies.

item.title: What to know about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding in NYC
item.description: The celebrity couple’s nuptials, dubbed 'America’s royal wedding', light up New York with excitement and speculation.

item.title: Keiko Fujimori officially declared winner of Peru presidential race
item.description: Peru's electoral authority solidifies right-wing Fujimori's narrow victory over left-wing Roberto Sanchez.

item.title: Israel prevents exiled Palestinian detainees from reuniting with their families
item.description: Palestinian prisoners released from Israeli jail but remain separated from loved ones due to travel restrictions.

item.title: Pakistan bus crash kills 40
item.description: At least 40 people were killed and eight others injured after a passenger bus plunged into a ravine in Pakistan.

item.title: World leaders pay tribute to Iran’s late leader Khamenei in Tehran
item.description: World leaders pay tribute to Iran's late leader Khamenei in Tehran

item.title: Heavy rain floods Mumbai during intense monsoon spell
item.description: Heavy monsoon rains have inundated parts of Mumbai, India's financial capital, causing widespread flooding.
